page_title: The world! EVAngelion JAZZ night -The Tokyo III Jazz club-
text:
The world! EVAngelion JAZZ night =The Tokyo III Jazz club= is an album by Shirō Sagisu. The album was published by King Records via its label STARCHILD with the catalog number KICA-3219, it was released on 24 December 2014. https://vgmdb.net/album/49278 It is an album with jazz arrangements of existing tracks and new ones. The cover was illustrated by Moyoco Anno.

Tracklist

Staff

Producers: Hideaki Anno, Moyocco Anno and Shirō Sagisu
Arrangements: Shirō Sagisu, Masamichi Amano, Miho Hazama
Vocals: Megumi Hayashibara (Track 03, 09 and 11)
Conductor: Nick Ingman
Performance: The London Studio Orchestra

References
